mission.title: gitea: Actions - Manually trigger a workflow/action
mission.description: Actions - Manually trigger a workflow/action. Requested by 176+ users.

steps.title: Check current gitea setup
steps.description:
Verify your gitea version and configuration:
```bash
gitea --version
```
This feature requires a working gitea installation.

steps.title: Review gitea configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant gitea configuration:
### Feature Description

Hey!

It would be very nice if we could have a button here to trigger a specific workflow/action:

So that I could trigger a job quickly, without having to push or waiting for a schedule.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Actions - Manually trigger a workflow/action
steps.description:
Add `workflow_dispatch` support to your Gitea Actions workflow so it can be triggered manually from the UI. PR #28163 added a 'Run workflow' button that appears when a workflow includes the `workflow_dispatch` event.

Example workflow configuration with manual trigger inputs:
```yaml
name: Docker Image CI

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      logLevel:
        description: 'Log level'
        required: true
        default: 'warning'
        type: choice
        options:
        - info
        - warning
        - debug
      tags:
        description: 'Test scenario tags'
        required: false
        type: boolean
```
Once configured, admins can trigger the workflow from the Actions tab by selecting the workflow and clicking 'Run workflow'.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Actions - Manually trigger a workflow/action" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: PR #28163 added support for manually triggering workflows via `workflow_dispatch` in Gitea Actions. When a workflow includes the `workflow_dispatch` event, admins see a 'Run workflow' button in the Actions UI. The implementation supports input types including choice, boolean, string, and environment, matching GitHub Actions compatibility.
codeSnippets:
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      logLevel:
        description: 'Log level'
        required: true
        default: 'warning'
        type: choice
        options:
        - info
        - warning
        - debug
      tags:
        description: 'Test scenario tags'
        required: false
        type: boolean

prerequisites.description: A working gitea installation or development environment.
